nodes.title: Add ZeroTimer
nodes.body:
# Pull Request

## Contribution
This pull request provides the following contribution to Kieker
- Contribution 1 Add a `ZeroTimer`, that acts as a `AbstractTimeSource` and just returns 0; should be used for factorial experiments with MooBench


## Code Quality Thresholds
- [ ] It was necessary to raise any code quality thresholds
- If yes, which had to be raised and why was it necessary?
..

nodes.title: Bump com.rabbitmq:amqp-client from 5.29.0 to 5.33.0
nodes.body:
Bumps [com.rabbitmq:amqp-client](https://github.com/rabbitmq/rabbitmq-java-client) from 5.29.0 to 5.33.0.
Release notes

Sourced from com.rabbitmq:amqp-client's releases.

5.33.0

Changes between 5.32.0 and 5.33.0

This is a maintenance release with bug fixes and dependency upgrades. It introduces minor breaking changes compared to 5.32.0 (see below for details). All users are encouraged to upgrade.

The RabbitMQ team normally maintain strict backward compatibility in minor versions. However, this release includes exceptional breaking changes that were necessary to patch security gaps and enforce secure-by-default behavior.

Breaking changes:

  • Hostname verification is now enabled by default as soon as TLS is used.
  • ConnectionFactory#useSslProtocol() now utilizes the JVM's default SSLContext, which validates the server certificate.
    • Note: This should primarily affect test environments, as useSslProtocol() was never intended for production use.
    • Action required: For test or development environments where certificate validation needs to be disabled, users can now explicitly switch to the new ConnectionFactory#useTlsWithNoVerification() method.
  • JSON-RPC support classes now introduce an "allowlist". This change only impacts installations that explicitly utilize these classes.

Harden RPC support classes

GitHub PR: #2002

Enable hostname verification by default

GitHub issue: #2005

Introduce helper for dev/test TLS setup

GitHub PR: #2001

Enforce inbound frame max more strictly

GitHub PRs: #1995 #1998

Bump dependencies

GitHub issue: #1991

Dependency

Maven

<dependency>
  <groupId>com.rabbitmq</groupId>
  <artifactId>amqp-client</artifactId>
  <version>5.33.0</version>
</dependency>

Gradle

compile 'com.rabbitmq:amqp-client:5.33.0'
</tr></table>

... (truncated)

Commits

  • 4a05f2b Fix NIO test
  • f02566a Merge pull request #2002 from rabbitmq/mergify/bp/v5.x/pr-2000
  • 38ef88e Merge pull request #2004 from rabbitmq/user-2/maven/v5.x/com.diffplug.spo...
  • 66ef941 Bump com.diffplug.spotless:spotless-maven-plugin from 3.7.0 to 3.8.0
  • c6089b0 Fix conflicts
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

[![user-2 compatibility score](https://user-2-badges.githubapp.com/badges/compatibility_score?dependency-name=com.rabbitmq:amqp-client&package-manager=gradle&previous-version=5.29.0&new-version=5.33.0)](https://docs.github.com/en/github/managing-security-vulnerabilities/about-user-2-security-updates#about-compatibility-scores) user-2 will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@user-2 rebase`. [//]: # (user-2-automerge-start) [//]: # (user-2-automerge-end) ---
user-2 commands and options
You can trigger user-2 actions by commenting on this PR: - `@user-2 rebase` will rebase this PR - `@user-2 recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@user-2 show ignore conditions` will show all of the ignore conditions of the specified dependency - `@user-2 ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop user-2 creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@user-2 ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop user-2 creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@user-2 ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop user-2 creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself)

nodes.title: Bump com.squareup.okhttp3:okhttp from 5.3.2 to 5.4.0
nodes.body:
Bumps [com.squareup.okhttp3:okhttp](https://github.com/square/okhttp) from 5.3.2 to 5.4.0.
Changelog

Sourced from com.squareup.okhttp3:okhttp's changelog.

Version 5.4.0

2026-06-08

  • New: Add superpowers to interceptors. Interceptors can now override anything settable on OkHttpClient.Builder, such as the cache, connection pool, socket factory, and DNS. We expect this will allow most users to use interceptors everywhere, insted of mixing and matching interceptors with custom Call.Factory wrappers.
  • Fix: Limit each HTTP/2 response to 256 KiB of total headers.
  • Upgrade: [kotlinx.coroutines 1.11.0][coroutines_1_11_0]. This is used by the optional okhttp-coroutines artifact.
  • Upgrade: [GraalVM 25.0.3][graalvm_25].
  • Upgrade: [Okio 3.17.0][okio_3_17_0].
Commits
  • 61423f4 Prepare for release 5.4.0.
  • d7e6eff Update eclipse.osgi to v3.24.200 (#9480)
  • 7a35098 Update bnd to v7.3.0 (#9475)
  • 0c5a45b Update dependency com.puppycrawl.tools:checkstyle to v13.5.0 (#9468)
  • 113ad17 Update dependency macos to v26 (#9457)
  • 84f601a Update shadow.plugin to v9.4.2 (#9466)
  • 7d463f4 Update spotless.plugin to v8.6.0 (#9464)
  • 3bf00f5 Update plugin com.diffplug.spotless to v8.6.0 (#9463)
  • cfc45a3 Update spotless.plugin to v8.5.1 (#9456)
  • 81c5006 Apply gradle lint correctly (#9459)
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

nodes.title: Bump gradle-wrapper from 8.14.4 to 9.6.1
nodes.body:
Bumps [gradle-wrapper](https://github.com/gradle/gradle) from 8.14.4 to 9.6.1.
Release notes

Sourced from gradle-wrapper's releases.

9.6.1

The Gradle team is excited to announce Gradle 9.6.1.

Here are the highlights of this release:

  • Improved Configuration Cache hit rates
  • Additional CLI rendering options
  • Important project hierarchy lookup deprecations

Read the Release Notes

We would like to thank the following community members for their contributions to this release of Gradle: Aharnish Solanki, Benedikt Johannes, Devendra Reddy Pennabadi, Dmytro Rodionov, Dreeam, Elías Hernández Rodríguez, Eng Zer Jun, FinlayRJW, Kamal Kansal, Marcono1234, Nelson Osacky, Philip Wedemann, Ravi, Roberto Perez Alcolea, Ryan Schmitt, Sebastian Schuberth, seunghun.ham, sk-reddy17, Suvrat Acharya, Vedant Madane.

Upgrade instructions

Switch your build to use Gradle 9.6.1 by updating your wrapper:

./gradlew :wrapper --gradle-version=9.6.1 && ./gradlew :wrapper

See the Gradle 9.x upgrade guide to learn about deprecations, breaking changes and other considerations when upgrading.

For Java, Groovy, Kotlin and Android compatibility, see the full compatibility notes.

Reporting problems

If you find a problem with this release, please file a bug on GitHub Issues adhering to our issue guidelines. If you're not sure you're encountering a bug, please use the forum.

We hope you will build happiness with Gradle, and we look forward to your feedback via Twitter or on GitHub.

9.6.0

... (truncated)

  • 040a978 Update fixed issues in release notes for 9.6.1
  • e0b8325 Restore --non-interactive flag instead of --interactive/--no-interactive (#38...
  • 946f3e6 Limit explicit temp file permission setting to intended use case (#38300)
  • 65f8224 Restore --non-interactive flag instead of --interactive/--no-interactive
  • e346a5e Adjust CLI flag to configure non-interactive console (#38301)
  • 9b53be9 Adjust CLI flag to configure non-interactive console
  • 0dd3b53 Limit explicit temp file permission setting to intended use case
  • 48e5ac2 Add reproducers
  • 25598fd Prepare 9.6.1 patch release (#38293)

nodes.title: Bump net.sourceforge.plantuml:plantuml from 1.2025.2 to 1.2026.6
nodes.body:
Bumps [net.sourceforge.plantuml:plantuml](https://github.com/plantuml/plantuml) from 1.2025.2 to 1.2026.6.
Release notes

Sourced from net.sourceforge.plantuml:plantuml's releases.

v1.2026.6

What's Changed

  • ✨ enable TeaVM JS build for the MIT license flavor by @​nanodeath in plantuml/plantuml#2741
  • ⬆️ Bump com.gorylenko.gradle-git-properties from 2.5.7 to 3.0.3 by @​user-2[bot] in plantuml/plantuml#2722
  • ⬆️ Bump com.github.librepdf:openpdf from 3.0.4 to 3.0.5 by @​user-2[bot] in plantuml/plantuml#2718
  • ⬆️ Bump teavm from 0.13.1 to 0.14.1 by @​user-2[bot] in plantuml/plantuml#2720
  • ⬆️ Bump org.graalvm.buildtools.native from 1.1.0 to 1.1.1 by @​user-2[bot] in plantuml/plantuml#2723
  • ⬆️ Bump org.xmlunit:xmlunit-core from 2.11.0 to 2.12.0 by @​user-2[bot] in plantuml/plantuml#2734
  • ⬆️ Bump com.gorylenko.gradle-git-properties from 3.0.3 to 4.0.1 by @​user-2[bot] in plantuml/plantuml#2733
  • ⬆️ Bump org.sonarqube from 7.3.0.8198 to 7.3.1.8318 by @​user-2[bot] in plantuml/plantuml#2738

New Contributors

  • @​nanodeath made their first contribution in plantuml/plantuml#2741

Full Changelog: https://github.com/plantuml/plantuml/compare/v1.2026.5...v1.2026.6

v1.2026.5

What's Changed

  • 🐛 fix HorizontalAlignment Right being ignored with MinimumWidth by @​rkdfx in plantuml/plantuml#2717
  • 🐛 accept decimal period, pulse and offset for timing clock by @​IgniparousTempest in plantuml/plantuml#2714
  • Fix 32-bit build failure caused by hardcoded JVM heap size by @​gbhavya07 in plantuml/plantuml#2721

New Contributors

  • @​rkdfx made their first contribution in plantuml/plantuml#2717
  • @​IgniparousTempest made their first contribution in plantuml/plantuml#2714
  • @​gbhavya07 made their first contribution in plantuml/plantuml#2721

Full Changelog: https://github.com/plantuml/plantuml/compare/v1.2026.4...v1.2026.5

Release - Native Image (v1.2026.4)

Version v1.2026.4 of the 2026-05-20 at 20:36:00 (UTC)

This is a Native Image release of the latest development work.

Credit or GitHub Action used

  • graalvm/setup-graalvm
  • thedoctor0/zip-release
  • svenstaro/upload-release-action

v1.2026.4

What's Changed

  • ✅ [vega] Add vega packet test by @​The-Lum in plantuml/plantuml#2691
  • 🐛 fix(svg-parser): support space-separated coordinates in polygon/polyl… by @​npiper in plantuml/plantuml#2692
  • 📝 README.md: Add compilation instructions by @​bobham-ct in plantuml/plantuml#2696
  • 📝 Fix doc and readme by @​The-Lum in plantuml/plantuml#2700
  • 👷 Refactor CI (add plantuml-mit-light on artefact, improve log, suppress pom_version management) by @​The-Lum in plantuml/plantuml#2703
  • ✅ vega: add SVG test (for id, option, and move interaction) by @​The-Lum in plantuml/plantuml#2705
  • ✨ Allow CSS style on single line by @​The-Lum in plantuml/plantuml#2713
  • ⬆️ Bump actions/add-to-project from 1.0.2 to 2.0.0 by @​user-2[bot] in plantuml/plantuml#2686
  • ⬆️ Bump org.graalvm.buildtools.native from 1.0.0 to 1.1.0 by @​user-2[bot] in plantuml/plantuml#2667
  • ⬆️ Bump org.sonarqube from 7.2.3.7755 to 7.3.0.8198 by @​user-2[bot] in plantuml/plantuml#2673
  • ⬆️ Bump org.junit.platform:junit-platform-launcher from 6.0.3 to 6.1.0 by @​user-2[bot] in plantuml/plantuml#2710

... (truncated)

Changelog

Sourced from net.sourceforge.plantuml:plantuml's changelog.

V1.2026.6 (Jun 8, 2026)

  • 🍵 update standard library with JSON data and examples
  • 🍵 allow %load_json on TeaVM
  • 🍵 fix skinparam style strictuml for TeaVM
  • 👷 fix release downstream jobs being silently skipped after upload
  • 🍵 allow %get_all_theme on TeaVM
  • 🚧 preparation for hour/minute/second precision gantts
  • 🐛 fix gui regression
  • [🍵 enable TeaVM JS build for the MIT license flavor (#2741)](https://github.com/plantuml/plantuml/commit/269cba38ff8c53e71ab32a0a632af47847a5ca76)
  • 👷 add MIT-flavored npm package assembly for @​plantuml/core
  • ✨ add Node/JS MCP server (plantuml-mcp-js) and MCP engine plumbing
  • 🐾 add errorLine in MCP check_syntax
  • ⚗️ add experimental diagram_explain to the JS MCP server and flesh out command explanations
  • 🐛 fix NPE in SVG nested diagram

V1.2026.5 (May 27, 2026)

  • 👷 improve Docker build
  • ♻️ clean StringBounder code
  • ♻️ simplify dictionary loading for GraalVM
  • 👷 add native image builds (windows + linux amd64/arm64)
  • [🍵 add npmPackage Gradle task to publish JS engine to npm (#2715)](https://github.com/plantuml/plantuml/commit/4dada3774a3f32559c055e7518f3c9d652f968b3)
  • 👷 rename native images
  • 🐛 add bitmap image support in PDF
  • 👷 add native image builds (macOS)
  • 🔧 add config file for GraalVM build
  • 📦️ add examples in standard library
  • [🐛 fix HorizontalAlignment Right being ignored with MinimumWidth (#2717)](https://github.com/plantuml/plantuml/commit/f609859e3209e4e4c4a168fd5ed7913f1ca06a9a)
  • [🐛 accept decimal period, pulse and offset for timing clock (#2714)](plantuml/plantuml#2711)
  • [👷 Fix 32-bit build failure caused by hardcoded JVM heap size (#2721)](https://github.com/plantuml/plantuml/commit/55b6a751bf935d85bcd02d279bac3226277f247f)
  • 📦️ update standard library

V1.2026.4 (May 20, 2026)

  • ♻️ use UBrex in Gantt diagram parsing
  • 🍵 revert to TeaVM 0.13.1
  • [🐛 fix(svg-parser): support space-separated coordinates in polygon/polyline sprites (#2692)](https://github.com/plantuml/plantuml/commit/5e9bc7e67aba8b973feb0c473b733452ca3d4342)
  • 🐛 fix '!' separator not recognized in class relation identifiers
  • 🐛 improve CSS style for state diagrams
  • 🍵 add support of OpenIconic icons in TeaVM
  • 🐛 improve unique id for SVG group elements
  • ✅ fix Vega tests with class drawing
  • 🍵 fix SVG document background color
  • 🐛 color specific days on gantt diagram
  • 🍵 Add dark mode toggle and "Copy as bitmap" button to the Playground
  • ✨ online style in state diagram
  • [✅ vega: add SVG test (for id, option, and move interaction) (#2705)](https://github.com/plantuml/plantuml/commit/f355dabd2d4305015e54a1cda97cc12ceac450f6)
  • 🐛 manage CSS for empty description states
  • 🐛 improve SVG arrow drawing
  • 🍵 playground: right-click menu to copy as bitmap or SVG

... (truncated)

Commits
  • 6287b33 🎉 version 1.2026.6
  • ea7ef9f 👷 fix npm package: ship LICENSE, correct sideEffects and exports map
  • f85b3a0 🐛 fix NPE in SVG nested diagram
  • 6021e24 🚧 preparation for hour/minute/second precision gantts
  • 48c4b30 ⚗️ add experimental diagram_explain to the JS MCP server and flesh out comman...
  • fb5d69d 🐾 add errorLine in MCP check_syntax
  • 52a8090 ✨ add Node/JS MCP server (plantuml-mcp-js) and MCP engine plumbing
  • 0043b6b 👷 add MIT-flavored npm package assembly for @​plantuml/core
  • 269cba3 🍵 enable TeaVM JS build for the MIT license flavor (#2741)
  • c09f4b2 Bump org.sonarqube from 7.3.0.8198 to 7.3.1.8318 (#2738)
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

nodes.title: Bump com.rabbitmq:amqp-client from 5.29.0 to 5.33.0
nodes.body:
Bumps [com.rabbitmq:amqp-client](https://github.com/rabbitmq/rabbitmq-java-client) from 5.29.0 to 5.33.0.
Release notes

Sourced from com.rabbitmq:amqp-client's releases.

5.33.0

Changes between 5.32.0 and 5.33.0

This is a maintenance release with bug fixes and dependency upgrades. It introduces minor breaking changes compared to 5.32.0 (see below for details). All users are encouraged to upgrade.

The RabbitMQ team normally maintain strict backward compatibility in minor versions. However, this release includes exceptional breaking changes that were necessary to patch security gaps and enforce secure-by-default behavior.

Breaking changes:

  • Hostname verification is now enabled by default as soon as TLS is used.
  • ConnectionFactory#useSslProtocol() now utilizes the JVM's default SSLContext, which validates the server certificate.
    • Note: This should primarily affect test environments, as useSslProtocol() was never intended for production use.
    • Action required: For test or development environments where certificate validation needs to be disabled, users can now explicitly switch to the new ConnectionFactory#useTlsWithNoVerification() method.
  • JSON-RPC support classes now introduce an "allowlist". This change only impacts installations that explicitly utilize these classes.

Harden RPC support classes
